rawContent:
I don't have access to Azure DevOps MCP tools, and this repository is hosted on GitHub (not Azure DevOps). The git remote points to `https://github.com/MoaidHathot/Orchestra.git`.

To query Azure DevOps pull requests, I would need either:
1. Azure DevOps MCP tools (not available in this environment)
2. The Azure DevOps organization URL and project name configured

Please provide:
- The Azure DevOps organization URL (e.g., `https://dev.azure.com/YourOrg`)
- The project name
- Or confirm if you meant to query GitHub pull requests instead
